title: sharky's random ideas
description: my most random, wierdest and funny ideas
body:
my most random, wierdest and funniest ideas are in this mod                                          
-----------------------------------------------**features**----------------------------------------------------------
things like the dirt dimension, the dirt toolset and dirt dude                                                   
-----------------------------------------------**Installation**----------------------------------------------------------
Follow these simple steps to get started:

Download the Mod: Head over to the mod’s download page (or click the green “Download” button) to grab the latest version.
Install NeoForge: Make sure you have the latest version of NeoForge installed for Minecraft 1.21.1
Save to Mods Folder: Place the downloaded mod file in the mods folder within your Minecraft directory.
On Windows: Press 
Win + R type 
```
%appdata%\.minecraft\mods
```
, and hit Enter.
On Mac: Navigate 
```
to ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods
```
.
Launch Minecraft: Open Minecraft with the NeoForge profile, and the mod will load automatically.
Enjoy: Dive into your Minecraft world and let the madness begin!
